working: ListenPage.svelte: full public listen page at momentummusic.vercel.app?s=XXXX
Loads share_sessions from Supabase REST API (no watcher needed)
Audio player: <source mp3 then wav> from Dropbox shareUrl (dl=0 → dl=1)
Pitch shift: [−][0][+] buttons, range −3 to +3 semitones
playbackRate = Math.pow(2, semitones/12), $effect re-applies on change
Stars background: SVG dots generated on mount (void = pure black)
Feedback form: PATCH to share_sessions.feedback array
Download links: MP3 and WAV from Dropbox
+page.svelte: ?s= param detected on mount, renders ListenPage instead of admin app
notes: Listen page uses Dropbox shareUrl with dl=0→dl=1 substitution for streaming. mp3ShareUrl will be null until transcoding completes (fire-and-forget). Pitch shift changes playbackRate which also shifts tempo — this is documented in the hint text on the UI. Tone.js was not added (no CDN available at build time).
